overview: Axis HealthCare operates 8 primary care clinics across eastern Oklahoma with same-day appointments and telemedicine services. Services include hormone replacement therapy, weight loss treatment with FDA-approved medications, pain management, psychiatry, and dermatology.
highlights: Testosterone injections and bio-identical hormone pellets
Weight loss program with Semaglutide and Tirzepatide
targetAudience: Patients seeking convenient primary care, hormone replacement therapy, and weight loss treatment in eastern Oklahoma.
